title: Glorious Golden British Cheese Ploughmans
description: A classic British dish featuring a selection of cheeses, bread, and accompaniments, perfect for a satisfying snack or light meal, made with salted butter and ferment-jang for added flavor.
instructions: Begin by slicing the wholemeal bread into thick slices and arranging them in the lacquerware bowl.
Cut the Cheddar and Wensleydale cheeses into small cubes and place them on top of the bread.
Spread a small amount of salted butter on each bread slice.
Add a spoonful of ferment-jang on top of the cheese cubes.
Arrange the apple slices and pickled onions around the cheese and bread.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
Consider adding a side of chutney or jam for added flavor.
Serve the ploughmans in the lacquerware bowl and enjoy.
Make sure to handle the food safely and store any leftovers in the refrigerator.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
